name: Hurricane Pike
description: A legendary pike once held as royal sigil of the ancient wyvern riders.

abilities.name: Hurricane Thrust
abilities.description: Pushes the caster and the enemy target away from each other. Cooldown: 19. Mana Cost: 150. Cast Range: 425. Push Distance: 425. Push Duration: 0.2. Attack Speed Bonus: 100. If the caster is ranged and the target is an enemy, greatly increases the caster's attack speed and grants them infinite attack range against the target for a few attacks, or until the buff expires. When cast on an ally or on self, pushes the target in the direction they are facing.

abilities.name: Dragon's Reach
abilities.description: Grants flat attack range bonus to ranged wielders. Attack Range Bonus: 130.
